message:
fix: resolve test failures from echarts migration and new code additions (#5174)

- compute.test.ts: Fix waitFor predicates to use expect() assertions
  instead of bare boolean expressions (which don't throw and cause
  waitFor to resolve immediately). Add gpuNodeCache.nodes = [] in
  beforeEach to prevent cross-test contamination from cache protection.
  Make updateGPUNodeCache test self-contained instead of depending on
  prior test state.

- helm.test.ts: Replace waitFor toBeDefined() with not.toBeNull()
  since null is technically "defined" but not the expected resolved
  state, causing waitFor to pass before async fetch completes.

- storage.test.ts: Call captured registerCacheReset callback in
  beforeEach to reset module-level pvcsCache between tests, preventing
  stale data from previous tests contaminating subsequent assertions.

- no-magic-numbers.test.ts: Update ratchet baselines for new echarts
  components (EXPECTED_MAGIC_NUMBER_COUNT 43->53, style-prop 2->12).

- ui-ux-standards.test.ts: Update inline style color ratchet baseline
  for WidgetExportModal (EXPECTED_INLINE_STYLE_COLOR_COUNT 98->204).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
